title: queria dichotoma
intro: Queria dichotoma, also known as Dichotoma or Quera, is a type of plant native to tropical Africa. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal effects. The health benefits of Queria dichotoma include reducing fever, treating respiratory infections, and alleviating symptoms of malaria. Queria dichotoma can be prepared as an infusion, tincture, or decoction, allowing for various herbal preparations to be made for its medicinal use.
